item.dc:creator: Frank Thorp V
Brennan Leach
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Senate passed legislation early Friday to fund President Donald Trump’s immigration enforcement agencies, after intense bipartisan backlash over a $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund threatened to derail the bill

media:content.media:description: The Capitol on June 3, 2026.

item.title: Senate passes $70B immigration enforcement bill without limits on ‘anti-weaponization’ fund

item.dc:creator: Keir Simmons
Natasha Lebedeva
Henry Austin
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin is set to deliver a speech at a flagship annual economic forum Friday, days after Ukrainian drone strikes rocked the host city St.

media:content.media:description: Russian President Vladimir Putin waves to Tanzanian President Samia Suluhu Hassan as she leaves the Kremlin in Moscow, Wednesday, June 3, 2026.
The opening ceremony Thursday for the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum.
A thick plume of black smoke over the port of St. Petersburg, Russia on Wednesday, following a Ukrainian drone attack.

item.title: Putin faces Ukrainian drone threat and stagnating economy at ‘Russian Davos’

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: The May jobs report, set to be released Friday morning, is expected to show that hiring has remained steady despite growing inflation.

media:content.media:text: Floridians Seek Employment Opportunities At Job Fair In Sunrise
media:content.media:description: Job seekers at the Mega JobNewsUSA South Florida Job Fair in Sunrise.

item.title: May jobs report expected to show growth in an economy squeezed by inflation

item.dc:creator: Allan Smith
item.description: Some anti-Trump Republicans have taken their political journey one step further: running for office as full-fledged Democrats. But so far in 2026, their new party’s primary voters haven’t shown much appetite for their candidacies.

media:content.media:description: George Conway in Milwaukee in 2024.
George Conway in Milwaukee in 2024.

item.title: Anti-Trump ex-Republicans are running in Democratic primaries. They’re off to a rocky start.

item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
Bridget Bowman
Sahil Kapur
item.description: For the Democratic Party, the road to Maine’s Senate primary is paved in dread.

media:content.media:description: Graham Platner, a Maine Democrat and U.S. Senate candidate, during an interview in York, Maine, on April 17, 2026.

item.title: Democrats navigate a new Graham Platner controversy in Maine’s battleground Senate race

item.dc:creator: Jesse Kirsch
item.description: Despite disappointment over seat locations, many supporters remain grateful for access to relatively affordable tickets.

media:content.media:text: A banner for the American Outlaws
media:content.media:description: An American Outlaws banner at a U.S. game against Portugal at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta March 31.

media:content.media:text: United States v Belgium - International Friendly
media:content.media:description: An American Outlaws banner at a U.S. game against Portugal at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta March 31.

item.title: Team USA’s loudest supporters say FIFA pushed them to upper deck for World Cup

item.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

media:content.media:title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
media:content.media:description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

item.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final

item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
item.description: Pritzker, who is widely viewed as having 2028 White House aspirations, is tapping into an issue seen as important to voters.

media:content.media:description: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker can't unilaterally halt the program, but the executive branch does wield some control over processing applications, according to his office.

item.title: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker to suspend tax breaks offered to data centers

item.dc:creator: Ryan J. Reilly
item.description: Trump’s DOJ could still pay Jan. 6 rioters even without ‘anti-weaponization fund’

media:content.media:description: The Justice Department building in Washington.
The Justice Department building in Washington.

item.title: DOJ could still pay Jan. 6 rioters even without ‘anti-weaponization’ fund

item.dc:creator: Frank Thorp V
Brennan Leach
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Senate passed legislation early Friday to fund President Donald Trump’s immigration enforcement agencies, after intense bipartisan backlash over a $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund threatened to derail the bill

item.title: Senate passes $70B immigration enforcement bill without limits on ‘anti-weaponization’ fund

item.dc:creator: Allan Smith
item.description: Some anti-Trump Republicans have taken their political journey one step further: running for office as full-fledged Democrats. But so far in 2026, their new party’s primary voters haven’t shown much appetite for their candidacies.

media:content.media:description: George Conway in Milwaukee in 2024.
George Conway in Milwaukee in 2024.

item.title: Anti-Trump ex-Republicans are running in Democratic primaries. They’re off to a rocky start.

item.dc:creator: Scott Wong
Kyle Stewart
item.description: Rep. Tom Kean, R-N.J., has offered little explanation for his ongoing absence. His social media posts highlight how Capitol Hill staffers have come to cover for bosses who are MIA.

media:content.media:description: Rep. Tom Kean, R-N.J., last voted in the House on March 5.

item.title: Missing congressman and his staff paint a picture of business as usual

item.dc:creator: Keir Simmons
Natasha Lebedeva
Henry Austin

The opening ceremony Thursday for the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum.
A thick plume of black smoke over the port of St. Petersburg, Russia on Wednesday, following a Ukrainian drone attack.

item.title: Putin faces Ukrainian drone threat and stagnating economy at ‘Russian Davos’

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
Emmy Beck-Aden
item.description: Handy played the bartender Jimmy in “Top Gun: Maverick,” Milton Briggs in “Arachnophobia” and other characters.

media:content.media:description: James Handy in an episode of "NYPD Blue" in 1995.

item.title: Actor James Handy stabbed to death in Los Angeles

item.dc:creator: Kyle Stewart
Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: The vote comes after the House passed a resolution earlier this week against President Donald Trump’s war against Iran.

media:content.media:description: Firefighters work to extinguish a fire following Russian strikes in Kyiv last month.

item.title: House passes Ukraine aid bill in another GOP rebuke of Trump’s foreign policy

item.dc:creator: Samantha Elkins
item.description: Cloudflare says 57.4% of requests to a selection of websites it hosts are now automated bot requests, while 42.6% are human-generated.

media:content.media:description: Humans might browse five websites before making a purchase, while an AI service might browse 5,000.

item.title: Bot web traffic has overtaken human web traffic, data shows

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: The men’s and women’s races will determine who will represent Team USA at the Los Angeles Olympics in 2028.

media:content.media:text: Conner Mantz crosses the finish line to place first during the 2024 U.S. Olympic Team Trials
media:content.media:description: Conner Mantz crosses the finish line to place first during the U.S. Olympic marathon trials in Orlando, Fla., on Feb. 3, 2024.

item.title: St. Louis to host 2028 U.S. Olympic marathon trials

item.dc:creator: Tony Lee
item.description: “Pride belongs to the community,” the city said.

media:content.media:description: Kathy Hilton in New York on May 7.

item.title: Kathy Hilton exits West Hollywood Pride role after backlash from LGBTQ+ community

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: We’re tracking the best early Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals live, including discounts on tech, home, beauty, kitchen products and more before the four-day sale begins.

media:content.media:text: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.
media:content.media:description: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.

media:content.media:text: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.
media:content.media:description: Amazon has early Prime Day deals on kitchen, tech, home items and more.

item.title: The 51+ best early Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals you can shop now: Bissell, Le Creuset, Levi’s, and more (live updates)

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: Target just announced its dates for Target Circle Week also called Target Circle Deal Days. The sale event will take place fromTuesday, June 23 to Friday, June 26.

media:content.media:text: Target Circle Week deals are available online, in the app and in stores.
media:content.media:description: Target Circle Week deals are available online, in the app and in stores.

media:content.media:text: Target Circle Week deals are available online, in the app and in stores.
media:content.media:description: Target Circle Week deals are available online, in the app and in stores.

item.title: Target just announced dates for Target Circle Week: Here’s everything you should know

item.dc:creator: Shalwah Evans
Select Staff
item.description: We tested popular and lesser known toothpastes, whitening strips, water flossers and other oral care products to find the 50 best of the year.

media:content.media:text: Dentists say the best toothpastes, toothbrushes, flossers and more can contribute to good oral health and keep you out of their chairs.
media:content.media:description: Dentists say the best toothpastes, toothbrushes, flossers and more can contribute to good oral health and keep you out of their chairs.

media:content.media:text: Dentists say the best toothpastes, toothbrushes, flossers and more can contribute to good oral health and keep you out of their chairs.
media:content.media:description: Dentists say the best toothpastes, toothbrushes, flossers and more can contribute to good oral health and keep you out of their chairs.

media:content.media:text: Photo of a hand squeezing Colgate’s Cavity Protection Fluoride Toothpaste onto a toothbrush

media:content.media:text: Photo of Sensodyne Clinical Repair Whiten & Shine toothpaste coming out of the tube
media:content.media:description: Dentists say the best toothpastes, toothbrushes, flossers and more can contribute to good oral health and keep you out of their chairs.

media:content.media:text: An Oral-B manual toothbrush sitting against a block with a tiled, green background.

media:content.media:text: A large bottle of Listerine mouthwash on a tiled background.

media:content.media:text: Two singular Plackers dental floss picks on a green bathroom tile background.
media:content.media:description: Dentists say the best toothpastes, toothbrushes, flossers and more can contribute to good oral health and keep you out of their chairs.

media:content.media:text: Waterpik Cordless advanced 2.0 water flosser on a green background
media:content.media:description: Dentists say the best toothpastes, toothbrushes, flossers and more can contribute to good oral health and keep you out of their chairs.

media:content.media:text: Bril toothbrush holder and cleaner on a green background.
media:content.media:description: Dentists say the best toothpastes, toothbrushes, flossers and more can contribute to good oral health and keep you out of their chairs.

item.title: 50 best oral care products, tested and reviewed

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: Le Creuset Dutch ovens, stainless steel pans, nonstick ceramic skillets and more are up to 40% off at the brand’s Summer Cookware Event.

media:content.media:text: Le Creuset’s cookware is known for its sturdiness and excellent heat retention.
media:content.media:description: Le Creuset’s cookware is known for its sturdiness and excellent heat retention.

item.title: Le Creuset Summer Sale: Save $170 on Dutch ovens and up to 40% on nonstick pans and more
